description: Shared definitions for the Semantic Interaction Protocol core schemas.

slug.description: A stable, unique identifier in snake_case format.

entity_ref.description: Reference to a declared entity_id within the same artifact.

unit_ref.description: Reference to a declared unit_id within the same artifact.

object_ref.description: Reference to any declared object (entity, unit, or view) within the same artifact.

provenance_source.description: Origin of an interpretation or state assignment. Common values: 'human', 'model', 'inferred', 'consensus'. Extended strings (e.g., 'model:gpt-4', 'human:editor') are permitted.

interpreted_value.description: A value that MAY carry confidence and provenance metadata. Either a plain value (any JSON type) or a structured wrapper.

oneOf.$comment: Plain value — type varies per field.

value.$comment: Same type as the plain form.

significance.description: Whether a step is causally essential or supplementary context.

causal_role_core.description: Function in causal chain. Core values: setup, trigger, complication, resolution. Profiles MAY extend.
